title: Deputy minister checks in on progress with media transition to digital
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Deputy Minister of Communications and Digital Technologies Mondli Gungubele led an oversight visit to monitor the progress of the Broadcast Digital Migration (BDM) programme in Knysna today, Thursday 19 June.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Deputy Minister of Communications and Digital Technologies Mondli Gungubele led an oversight visit to monitor the progress of the Broadcast Digital Migration (BDM) programme in Knysna today, Thursday 19 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The visit aimed to evaluate the implementation of the programme and ensure its successful rollout. Gungubele was accompanied by Knysna Mayor Thando Matika, his mayoral committee, and councillors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visit included door-to-door engagements with residents to assess the quality of installations and the satisfaction of the beneficiaries. There was also an interaction with residents to get feedback on the programme.","html":"The visit included door-to-door engagements with residents to assess the quality of installations and the satisfaction of the beneficiaries. There was also an interaction with residents to get feedback on the programme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The BDM programme is a government initiative to transition television and radio broadcasting from analogue to digital technology.","html":"The BDM programme is a government initiative to transition television and radio broadcasting from analogue to digital technology."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Set-top boxes (decoders) are provided for free to qualifying indigent households. People who qualify are those earning R3 500 or less per month."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This provides free digital migration and ensures equitable access to digital television services. Application forms are available at the South African Post Office.","html":"This provides free digital migration and ensures equitable access to digital television services. Application forms are available at the South African Post Office."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Deputy minister checks in on progress with media transition to digital
